publishedAbstract: In the event, it is necessary to review the PostgreSQL (pgsql) logs/configs internally or submit them to an external source such as a BugZilla/JIRA case the following process should assist. **NOTE:** In ODF v4.19+, the pgsql logs are native to the pod. No need to go into the pod to investigate, therefore this solution is not needed.
publishedTitle: How to Obtain NooBaa DB PostgreSQL Logs and Configurations - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) ODF v4.18 and Below
